_instructions.description: Interpersonal trust question: 'Generally speaking, would you say that most people can be trusted, or that you need to be very careful in dealing with people?' Value = percentage answering 'Most people can be trusted'.
_instructions.status: PARTIALLY VERIFIED - already in wvs.json, flag for manual review
notes: The existing wvs.json file was partially verified in the data audit.
This template is for review/update purposes only.
WVS data does NOT change annually - Wave 7 covers 2017-2022.
Not all countries participate in every wave.
